title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim founded Paraform, a hiring platform that has paid out over $50 million to human recruiters rather than automating them away. The company achieved 10x revenue growth by focusing on recruiter efficiency and customer outcomes, arguing that AI has made hiring noisier and more difficult rather than faster.
